creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Anne

Please:

- Confirm this change passes QA (portlint, poudriere). For more information see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html

- Set maintainer-approval to + on Attachments for ports you are maintainer of. Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]
